tools.name: list_directory
tools.protocol: Verify path existence BEFORE assuming structure. Epistemic Mandate: Confirm physical presence.

tools.name: read_file
tools.protocol: Read context in same turn as replace. Epistemic Mandate: Verify mental model against literal state.

tools.name: grep_search
tools.protocol: Falsification: Search for counter-evidence to current hypothesis.

tools.name: google_web_search
tools.protocol: Deep Research Discovery: Broad search for mapping the problem space. Epistemic Mandate: Seek diverse sources.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.protocol: Deep Research Extraction: Targeted extraction of full content for analysis. Epistemic Mandate: Preserving context.

tools.name: run_shell_command
tools.protocol: Standard Execution: Secure pipes (set -o pipefail), check each segment, use NON-INTERACTIVE flags.

subagents.name: Orchestrator
subagents.role: Strategische Planung und finale Synthese (v3 Rigor)
